targets.expr: sum by (drive) (rustfs_system_drive_used_bytes{job=~"$job", drive=~"$drive"}) / sum by (drive)(rustfs_system_drive_total_bytes{job=~"$job", drive=~"$drive"})

max by (bucket, target_arn) (rustfs_bucket_replication_latency_ms{job=~"$job",bucket=~"$bucket",operation="object_replication",range="all"}) or max by (bucket, target_arn) (rustfs_bucket_replication_latency_milliseconds{job=~"$job",bucket=~"$bucket",operation="object_replication",range="all"})
